title: Hanuman Aarti
intro: A traditional aarti dedicated to Lord Hanuman, sung during worship and ceremonies.
description:
|| Hanuman Aarti ||
Aarti kije Hanuman Lala ki.
Dushta dalan Raghunath kala ki.
Jaake bal se girivar kaanpe.
Rog dosh jaake nikat na jhaanke.
meaning: This aarti praises Hanuman's strength, devotion and service to Lord Rama.

faq.q1: When is the Hanuman Aarti sung?
faq.a1: On Tuesdays and Saturdays, and during pujas and festivals.
faq.q2: Which hand should I use for aarti?
faq.a2: Traditionally the right hand is used to wave the lamp.
